chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.S-262 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For order son office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 20.10.2025 Mr. Akhtiar Ahmed Heesbani, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General ************** Through the present petition, the petitioners have approached this Court seeking protection against alleged harassment at the hands of the official respondents, purportedly at the instance of private respondents. The official respondents have filed their respective statements /comments, which are taken on record. They have, however, denied the allegations leveled against them and submitted that they have neither caused any undue harassment to the petitioners nor do they intend to do so in the future, except in accordance with due process of law. Mr. Toufique Hussain Noonari, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.5 to 8, which is taken on record. He contends that the private respondents have not harassed the petitioners and have no intention to do so. In view of the above statements, learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of. However, the official respondents are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioners, and to provide them equal protection as provided under the scheme of law. This order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial, if already pending against the petitioners before any competent forum.

This order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial, if already pending against the petitioners before any competent forum. J U D G E M. Ali*
